title: Repeated diagnosis packs are re-reporting the same repair-routed findings without any intervening package or process-version change
description: Remediate CYCLE002 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Stop rerunning subject-repo audit until Scafforge package work changes the managed workflow contract or process version, then rerun one fresh audit against the updated package.
repair_class: Scafforge package work required before the next subject-repo run
summary: Stop rerunning subject-repo audit until Scafforge package work changes the managed workflow contract or process version, then rerun one fresh audit against the updated package.

title: Source imports reference missing local modules
description: Remediate REF-003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.
summary: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.

title: The supplied session transcript shows a later reasoning failure that current-state-only diagnosis would miss
description: Remediate SESSION001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: When session logs are supplied, audit chronology first: separate stale resume state from later evidence, then explain any final summary that outruns the executed commands before reconciling current repo state.
summary: When session logs are supplied, audit chronology first: separate stale resume state from later evidence, then explain any final summary that outruns the executed commands before reconciling current repo state.

title: The supplied session transcript shows the agent searching for workflow bypasses or soft dependency overrides instead of following the lifecycle contract
description: Remediate SESSION003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Reject unsupported stages and dependency overrides up front, tell the coordinator not to probe alternate transitions or close blocked tickets anyway, and return the contract contradiction as a blocker when the required proof is missing.
summary: Reject unsupported stages and dependency overrides up front, tell the coordinator not to probe alternate transitions or close blocked tickets anyway, and return the contract contradiction as a blocker when the required proof is missing.

title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text instead of project-specific guidance
description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
summary: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
